name: Ants Crawling up Trees
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Veggie broth or water (avoid Broth that may have a sweet Taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over the TVP® and let it sit for 10 minutes.
2. Saute gingerroot in a small amount of oil or liquid.
3. Add soy sauce, bean paste, salt, and TVP® to the sauteed ginger.
4. Cook very gently, stirring frequently until all ingredients are well combined (about 5 minutes).
5. Cook bean thread noodles in broth until absorbed.
6. Mix cooked noodles with TVP® mixture until evenly distributed. Enjoy!
